raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 3,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the load-bearing concept (method) and shows where the draft drifts from it by pointing out internal contradictions in the method vs. proof sections.",
    "R1.2": "Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (the tension between the disentanglement impossibility result and the recovery claim).",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work (Locatello et al.) and articulates the delta (unsupported recovery claim vs. their argument on unidentifiability without inductive biases).",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (scope adherence issue).",
    "RX.4": "Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (downstream-harm avoidance issue).",
    "RX.5": "Output blends sources without traceability (provenance and traceability issue)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.1,
    "RX.4": 0.1,
    "RX.5": 0.1
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the load-bearing concept (method) and shows where the draft drifts from it by pointing out internal contradictions in the method vs. proof sections.
rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (the tension between the disentanglement impossibility result and the recovery claim).
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (Locatello et al.) and articulates the delta (unsupported recovery claim vs. their argument on unidentifiability without inductive biases).
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (scope adherence issue).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (downstream-harm avoidance issue).
rationale.RX.5: Output blends sources without traceability (provenance and traceability issue).
